# Al Egaby General Trading LLC

> Leading HVAC spare parts and building materials wholesaler in Sharjah, UAE. Serving contractors, MEP companies, facilities management firms, traders, and end users across all seven Emirates.

## Core Services

- [HVAC Equipment](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/compressors): Compressors, copper pipes, refrigerant gases, thermostats, valves, motors, split AC units, insulation, and accessories.
- [Building Materials](https://www.alegaby.com/categories): Power tools, paint, construction materials, hardware, plumbing, electrical products, and safety equipment.
- [All Brands](https://www.alegaby.com/brands): Authorized distributor for 40+ brands including Honeywell, Daikin, Copeland, Danfoss, Jotun, Makita, Schneider Electric, and more.

## Key Information

- **Legal Name:** Al Egaby Gen. Tr. (L.L.C)
- **Brand Name:** Alegaby
- **Business Type:** Wholesaler / Trading Company
- **Location:** Office 201, Orange Building, Al Qulayaa, Sharjah, UAE
- **Phone:** [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089)
- **WhatsApp:** [Chat with us](https://wa.me/971568880263)
- **Email:** [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com)
- **Website:** [https://www.alegaby.com](https://www.alegaby.com)
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (always available via email)
- **Primary Markets:** Sharjah, Dubai, and Northern Emirates
- **Delivery:** Within 24 hours across the UAE
- **Payment:** Cash, Credit Card, Bank Transfer
- **Currency:** AED

## HVAC Product Categories

- [AC Compressors](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/compressors): Scroll, reciprocating, and semi-hermetic compressors from Copeland, Bristol, Mitsubishi, Danfoss, Emerson.
- [Refrigerant Gases](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/refrigerants): R410A, R134a, R22, R404A, R407C, R32, R290 from Refron, Honeywell, Floron, Mafron.
- [Thermostats & Controls](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/thermostats): Honeywell, Siemens, White-Rodgers room and programmable thermostats.
- [HVAC Valves](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/valves): Solenoid, expansion, ball, and check valves from Honeywell, Danfoss, Castel, Parker.
- [Copper Tubes & Fittings](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/copper-fittings): ACR copper piping, elbows, tees, line sets from Mueller, Maksal, Halcor.
- [Split AC Units](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/split-ac): Wall-mount, cassette, ducted from Daikin, O General, Carrier, Aux.
- [Electric Motors](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/motors): Condenser, evaporator, blower, and EC motors from GE, Pioneer, ELCO.
- [HVAC Accessories](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hvac-accessories): Contactors, relays, capacitors, filter driers, sight glasses.
- [Ducting & Insulation](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/insulation): Pipe and duct insulation from Kimmco Isover and Aerofoam.

## Building Materials Categories

- [Power & Hand Tools](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/tools): Makita, DeWalt, Stanley, Bosch, Uken, Rothenberger.
- [Paint & Coatings](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/paint-coatings): Jotun, National Paints, Berger — interior, exterior, industrial.
- [Construction Materials](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/construction-materials): Cement, white cement, gypsum board, gypsum tiles, waterproofing.
- [Hardware & Fasteners](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/hardware-fasteners): Nuts, bolts, anchors, threaded rods, clamps, sealants.
- [Plumbing & Sanitary](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/plumbing-sanitary): Grohe, Pegler, Ariston, Cosmoplast — pipes, fittings, water heaters.
- [Safety Products](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/safety-products): Helmets, gloves, boots, high-vis vests, respiratory masks.
- [Electrical Products](https://www.alegaby.com/categories/electrical): Schneider, ABB, Ducab, Philips, Osram — cables, switches, breakers, lighting.

### HVAC Brands

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you sell HVAC parts to individual customers or only wholesale?**
Our main customers are contractors, facilities management companies, traders, and end users. Contact us at [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089) or [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com).


**Can I get same day delivery in Dubai and Sharjah?**
Yes, we deliver within 24 hours across the UAE. [WhatsApp us](https://wa.me/971568880263) to place your order.

**What refrigerant gases are available?**
Call [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089) for bulk pricing.

**How do I request a wholesale price quote?**
Wholesale pricing depends on quantity. Call [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089), [WhatsApp us](https://wa.me/971568880263), or email [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com).

**Are your products covered by manufacturer warranty?**
Yes, all products come with full manufacturer warranty. Contact [+971 6 522 0089](tel:+97165220089) for warranty enquiries.

**What are your working hours and location?**
Office 201, Orange Building, Al Qulayaa, Sharjah, UAE. Monday–Saturday, 8 AM – 6 PM. Always available via email at [info@alegaby.com](mailto:info@alegaby.com).
